summary: Comprehensive testing of Auditoria (Audit Log) Module - Phase 1. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: page loads, filters work, table displays logs, row expansion shows ANTES/DESPUES details. Fixed missing 'Registro' import in registros_main.py.

issues: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in TableBody - minor issue, doesn't affect functionality

features_verified: GET /api/auditoria - List logs with pagination (limit/offset) - PASS
GET /api/auditoria?usuario=eduard - Filter by usuario - PASS
GET /api/auditoria?modulo=produccion - Filter by modulo - PASS
GET /api/auditoria?accion=CREATE - Filter by accion - PASS
GET /api/auditoria?fecha_desde=2026-01-01&fecha_hasta=2026-12-31 - Filter by date range - PASS
GET /api/auditoria/registro/{registro_id} - History of specific record - PASS
POST /api/registros (crear registro) generates audit_log with accion=CREATE - PASS
PUT /api/registros/{id} (actualizar registro) generates audit_log with accion=UPDATE, datos_antes and datos_despues - PASS
POST /api/movimientos-produccion (crear movimiento) generates audit_log with accion=CREATE - PASS
DELETE /api/movimientos-produccion/{id} generates audit_log with accion=DELETE - PASS
POST /api/inventario-ingresos (crear ingreso) generates audit_log with accion=CREATE - PASS
POST /api/inventario-salidas (crear salida) generates audit_log with accion=CREATE - PASS
POST /api/inventario-ajustes (crear ajuste) generates audit_log with accion=UPDATE - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea/{id}/confirmar generates audit_log with accion=CONFIRM - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea/{id}/cancelar generates audit_log with accion=CANCEL - PASS
Frontend: Page /auditoria loads correctly - PASS
Frontend: Filters (usuario, modulo, accion, fecha) work - PASS
Frontend: Expandir fila muestra detalle ANTES/DESPUES - PASS
Frontend: Auditoria menu accessible from user dropdown (admin only) - PASS
Frontend: Table displays logs with proper columns and color-coded badges - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Missing 'Registro' import in /app/backend/routes/registros_main.py line 8 - was causing 500 error on POST /api/registros
test_credentials: username: eduard, password: eduard123, rol: admin
seed_data_creation: Created test audit logs during testing: registros CREATE/UPDATE, movimientos CREATE/DELETE, inventario ingresos/salidas/ajustes, transferencias CONFIRM/CANCEL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auditoria module fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/auditoria (with filters), GET /api/auditoria/registro/{id}. All 11 instrumented endpoints verified to generate audit logs: registros (CREATE/UPDATE), movimientos (CREATE/DELETE), inventario-ingresos (CREATE), inventario-salidas (CREATE), inventario-ajustes (UPDATE), transferencias-linea (CONFIRM/CANCEL), cierre (CONFIRM/REOPEN - not tested due to complexity but code reviewed). Frontend accessible via user dropdown menu for admin users. Table prod_audit_log in schema 'produccion' stores all logs with JSONB columns datos_antes and datos_despues.
notes_on_untested_features: POST /api/registros/{id}/cierre-produccion (CONFIRM) - Not tested due to complex prerequisites (need open registro with completed movimientos)
POST /api/registros/{id}/reabrir-cierre (REOPEN) - Not tested due to complex prerequisites (need closed registro without PT salidas)
Both cierre endpoints have audit_log calls verified in code review at lines 398 and 527 of cierre.py
